key_factors: Current World Cup roster and availability
Player club-league and club-table power rankings
Current tournament record, goals for, and goals against
Venue scoring: high-scoring at MetLife Stadium
picks.model_basis: current squad player power, tournament form, venue scoring, and market context; no head-to-head input
picks.reason: Brazil owns the stronger current-squad projection. Attack 92.8, midfield 89.5, defense 90.8, goalkeeper 91.8. Top player ranks: Alisson Becker 93.5, Gabriel Magalhães 93.5, Bruno Guimarães 93.5. Brazil form 2-0-0 (3.00 pts/g, 2.50-0.50 goals/g).
